options.name: -c
options.description: Execute the Python code in command

options.name: -m
options.description: Run library module as a script

options.name: -u
options.description: Force unbuffered stdout and stderr streams

name: -V
--version
options.description: Print the Python version number and exit

options.name: -B
options.description: Do not write .pyc files on import

options.name: -OO
options.description: Remove assert statements, __debug__-dependent statements, and docstrings

options.name: -s
options.description: Do not add user site-packages directory to sys.path

options.name: -S
options.description: Do not imply 'import site' on initialization

options.name: -q
options.description: Do not print version and copyright messages on interactive startup
